text: Evaluate wiring a sponsor API (Composio tools / Tavily search) into the agent's information streams
description: Optional strengthener that aligns with existing aim "Maintain information streams for autonomous agent context" (3045f505). Tavily search → real web-research input during the DISCOVERING state; Composio → broader tool orchestration (ties to "Build multi-tool orchestration capability"). Scope tightly: only worth it if it visibly improves the demo within the build window, otherwise defer. Keep it from becoming a rabbit hole — a sponsor logo is not worth derailing the core demo.

status.comment: Nice-to-have; gated on not derailing the core demo. Relates to info-streams aim 3045f505.
